---
title: "Teaching & Outreach"
---

## Teaching Experience

| Role | Institution | Period |
|---|---|---|
| **Lecturer** – *Introduction to Scientific Work* | Universität Zürich, Switzerland | 06.2025 – Present |
| **Co-supervisor** – Master's Thesis Project | Universität Basel, Switzerland | 02.2024 – 02.2025 |
| **Lecturer** – *Introduction to Biology* | Universität Basel, Switzerland | 09.2024 – 12.2024 |
| **Instructor** – *Introduction to Laboratory Protocols* | Universität Basel, Switzerland | 10.2023 – 04.2024 |
| **Guest Lecturer** – *Vertebrate Palaeozoology* | Universität Zürich, Switzerland | 09.2020 – 12.2020 |

---

## Conference Presentations

::: {.conf-entry}
**Biology24** · University of Zürich, Switzerland · *2024*  
Oral presentation — *Investigating the causes of adaptation in three-spined sticklebacks.*
:::

::: {.conf-entry}
**3rd AsiaEvo Conference** · National University of Singapore, Singapore · *2023*  
Oral presentation — *Investigating the causes of adaptation in three-spined sticklebacks (a spiny subject).*
:::

::: {.conf-entry}
**10th International Conference on Stickleback Behaviour and Evolution** · University of Hólar, Iceland · *2022*  
Oral presentation — *Developmental genetic basis of skeletal evolution in stickleback fish.*
:::

::: {.conf-entry}
**Biology19** · University of Zürich, Switzerland · *2019*  
Poster presentation — *Skeletal variation in bird domestication.*
:::

---

## Awards & Funding

| Award | Year |
|---|---|
| Freiwillige Akademische Gesellschaft fellowship | 2025 |
| University of Basel travel fund for early career researchers | 2023, 2024 |
| Scholarship from Swiss-European Mobility Programme (SEMP) | 2019 |

---

## Certifications & Licences

**LTK Module 20** — Approved to perform animal experimentation on aquatic animals under Swiss law (Switzerland).

---

## Professional Memberships

- Member of the **Society for the Study of Amphibians and Reptiles (SSAR)**
- Member of the **Swiss Reproducibility Network**
- Reviewer for **Molecular Ecology**
